'''fabumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thanah|thanah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thanah|thanah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fabumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæbimith|fæbimith]] || [[word:fæbimij|fæbimij]] || [[word:fæbimish|fæbimish]] || [[word:fæbimi|fæbimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabubumuth|fabubumuth]] || [[word:fabubumuj|fabubumuj]] || [[word:fabubumush|fabubumush]] || [[word:fabubumu|fabubumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabumuth|fabumuth]] || [[word:fabumuj|fabumuj]] || [[word:fabumush|fabumush]] || [[word:fabumu|fabumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabufmuth|fabufmuth]] || [[word:fabufmuj|fabufmuj]] || [[word:fabufmush|fabufmush]] || [[word:fabufmuf|fabufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fabumuthu|fabumuthu]] || [[word:fabumuju|fabumuju]] || [[word:fabumushu|fabumushu]] || [[word:fabumuku|fabumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fabumuth|fabumuth]] || [[word:fabumuj|fabumuj]] || [[word:fabumush|fabumush]] || [[word:fabumu|fabumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fabumuthul|fabumuthul]] || [[word:fabumujul|fabumujul]] || [[word:fabumushul|fabumushul]] || [[word:fabumukul|fabumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fabumuthuthu|fabumuthuthu]] || [[word:fabumujuju|fabumujuju]] || [[word:fabumushushu|fabumushushu]] || [[word:fabumuku|fabumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fabumuthun|fabumuthun]] || [[word:fabumujun|fabumujun]] || [[word:fabumushun|fabumushun]] || [[word:fabumukun|fabumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fabumuthuoro|fabumuthuoro]] || [[word:fabumujuoro|fabumujuoro]] || [[word:fabumushuoro|fabumushuoro]] || [[word:fabumukuoro|fabumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
